summary.key_theme: Ford 透過 MLB 合作與能源技術佈局尋求長期成長，但短期面臨大規模召回與全球市場競爭壓力。

bullish.title: Assessing Ford Motor (F) Valuation After New MLB Partnership And EV Sustainability Updates
bullish.reason: Ford 成為 MLB 官方汽車合作夥伴，有助於提升品牌形象與市場曝光度，並結合 V2H 能源技術推動長期成長潛力。

bullish.title: Ford vs. Stellantis: Which Automaker Stock Has the Edge Now?
bullish.reason: 分析指出 Ford 在營收成長、Ford Pro 商用部門動能及股息發放上優於 Stellantis，具備較佳的投資吸引力。

bullish.title: How much to invest in Ford stock for $1,000 in 2026 dividends
bullish.reason: 強調 Ford 的股息收益價值，吸引尋求穩定現金流的長期投資者。

bullish.title: Ford Motor Company (F) Surpasses Market Returns: Some Facts Worth Knowing
bullish.reason: 股價表現優於大盤，反映出市場對其近期營運表現的正面回饋。

bullish.title: Ford Motor Company (F) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
bullish.reason: 投資人關注度提升，顯示市場對 Ford 的後續發展保持高度興趣。

bullish.title: T. ROWE PRICE EXPLORES LEADERSHIP, TRANSFORMATION, AND THE FUTURE OF MOBILITY WITH FORD CEO JIM FARLEY
bullish.reason: CEO Jim Farley 與大型投資機構對話，有助於向市場傳達公司的轉型願景與策略方向。

bearish.title: Update: Ford Motor Recalling Over 250,000 SUVs in US Due to Software Issues
bearish.reason: 召回 25.4 萬輛 SUV 涉及軟體與倒車顯影問題，直接影響品質聲譽並增加維修成本。

bearish.title: Ford CEO Jim Farley receives career‑high $27.5M compensation in 2025
bearish.reason: 在面臨召回與轉型挑戰下，CEO 獲得 2,750 萬美元的高額薪酬可能引發股東對薪酬合理性的質疑。

bearish.title: Ford's "Most Radical Change" Was Supposed to Reduce Costs. What if It Does the Opposite?
bearish.reason: 質疑 Ford 的成本削減策略是否有效，特別是在面對中國電動車競爭對手時的轉型壓力。

bearish.title: Ford Has Run Out Of Places To Go
bearish.reason: 分析指出 Ford 在全球主要市場（中國、歐盟、美國）面臨成長瓶頸，長期發展空間受限。

bearish.title: Ford stock drops, but GM, Stellantis up for week ending March 27
bearish.reason: 短期股價表現落後於同業，反映市場對其近期表現的負面情緒。

bearish.title: OPSEU/SEFPO slams Ford's spending priorities after another provincial budget leaves public services behind
bearish.reason: 此處指涉的是加拿大安大略省政府（Ford 政府），雖非汽車公司 Ford，但可能造成品牌名稱混淆與負面輿論。

bearish.title: Ford Shareholder Activism Puts Governance And DEI Oversight In Focus
bearish.reason: 股東提案增加，顯示公司治理與 DEI 政策面臨壓力，可能增加管理層的行政負擔。

neutral.title: Gene Munster Says Upcoming Tesla Deliveries Will Be 'First Good Read,' As Ford, GM Scale Back EV Ambitions
neutral.reason: 提及 Ford 縮減電動車野心，這是產業趨勢的描述，對 Ford 而言是策略調整的必要性。

neutral.title: Ford Issues 2026 Proxy Statement, Sets Virtual Annual Meeting for May 14
neutral.reason: 例行性公告股東大會日期與代理聲明，屬於公司正常運作程序。
